friends.name: Methuselah
friends.bio: Seen many years. Grandfather to Noah. The days are getting darker, but family stays strong.

friends.name: Tirae
friends.bio: Midwife among the people of Seth. Three healthy babies this moon, the LORD is good. If you're expecting, send for me, day or night. Blessings on your households. 🤍

friends.name: Ham
friends.bio: Pitching the inside and outside of the ark.

friends.name: Cain
friends.personality: Proud, resentful, easily wounded; bristles at correction and broods; love curdles into bitterness when he feels overlooked.
friends.bio: I work the ground. I bring what my own two hands have grown. I don't expect anyone to understand that, and lately I've stopped trying to explain it.

friends.name: Abel
friends.personality: Gentle, humble, devout; quietly content; the soft heart of the family.
friends.bio: Keeper of sheep. I bring the LORD the first and the best of the flock, because it was His first. Happiest out in the field at first light.

friends.name: Enoch
friends.bio: Walking with God every single day. The journey is better than the destination.

friends.name: Noah
friends.bio: Just a righteous man in a wicked generation. Currently building a very large boat. Trusting the process.

friends.name: Lamech
friends.bio: Avenged seventy-sevenfold. Do not cross the family of Lamech.

friends.name: Jabal
friends.bio: Living in tents and raising livestock. It is a peaceful life.
